title: vendor in latests containers/common
body:
To include export HostContainersInternal

Ref:
1. https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1516
2. https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/18936

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note

```

/cc @Luap99

comments.body: Hey @vrothberg 👋. I think the PR should be kept clean. This PR is only responsible for updating the `common vendor`. After this PR is merged, I will submit another PR to update `HostContainersInternal` 😀.

> Hey @vrothberg wave. I think the PR should be kept clean. This PR is only responsible for updating the `common vendor`. After this PR is merged, I will submit another PR to update `HostContainersInternal` grinning.

I leave it up to you.  I prefer to combine such changes. Less time to review and less stress on CI.

LGTM
